title: GAIA qa-test-cases.json — Phase 3C TC generation output (E67-S4)
description: Per-story QA test-case specifications produced by /gaia-review-qa Phase 3C for uncovered ACs. Consumed downstream by /gaia-test-automate. Each entry traces back to a specific AC in the story file. Refs: AC1, AC2, FR-RSV2-2, TC-RSV2-QAREVIEW-1, ADR-077.

tc_id.description: Stable TC identifier in the form TC-{story_key}-{N} (e.g., TC-E67-S4-1).

ac_ref.description: Reference to the AC this TC traces to (e.g., AC1).

description.description: One-line summary of what the TC verifies.

priority.description: Optional priority hint inherited from the AC priority.
